recommendations.title: Happy Christmas
recommendations.overview: After a breakup with her boyfriend, a young woman moves in with her older brother, his wife, and their 2-year-old son.

recommendations.title: Orphan
recommendations.overview: After losing their baby, a married couple adopt 9-year old Esther, who may not be as innocent as she seems.

recommendations.title: A Star Is Born
recommendations.overview: Drunken, has-been rock star John Norman Howard falls in love with unknown singer Esther Hoffman after seeing her perform at a club. He lets her sing a few songs at one of his shows and she becomes the talk of the music industry. Esther's star begins

recommendations.title: Win It All
recommendations.overview: A gambling addict faces a conflict when entrusted with keeping a bunch of money that isn't his.

recommendations.title: Slaughter High
recommendations.overview: Eight different people are invited to their 10-year high school reunion at their now-closed down high school where a former student, disfigured from a prank gone wrong, is there to seek revenge.
recommendations.director: Mark Ezra, George Dugdale, Peter Mackenzie Litten

recommendations.title: Once Upon My Mother

recommendations.title: Ad Vitam
recommendations.overview: When he and his pregnant wife are attacked in their home, a former elite agent becomes trapped in a deadly manhunt tied to his own painful past.

recommendations.title: Orphan: First Kill

recommendations.title: Wrong Turn
recommendations.overview: Chris crashes into a carload of other young people, and the group of stranded motorists is soon lost in the woods of West Virginia, where they're hunted by three cannibalistic mountain men who are grossly disfigured by generations of inbreeding.
